bead.title: tests: initialize bare .ddx fixtures with config.yaml
bead.description:
PROBLEM: Tightening `ddxroot.Path` to require `.ddx/config.yaml` exposes many tests that build only a bare `.ddx/` directory while relying on the old contract that any `.ddx/` means project state lives in-tree.

ROOT CAUSE WITH FILE:LINE: The resolver bug is in `cli/internal/ddxroot/ddxroot.go:Path()`, but the fixture blast radius is in tests that create bare `.ddx/` directories, including `cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver_agent_metrics_test.go:fixtureWorkingDir`, `cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver_workingdir_ctx_test.go`, `cli/internal/agent/execution_cleanup_test.go`, `cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop_interrupted_attempt_test.go`, `cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_commit_test.go`, `cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_worktree_cleanup_test.go`, `cli/internal/agent/serviceconfig_test.go`, `cli/internal/agent/drain_regression_test.go`, `cli/internal/agent/operator_prompt_backlinks_test.go`, `cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop_cleanup_test.go`, `cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_artifacts_test.go`, and `cli/internal/agent/execution_resources_test.go`.

PROPOSED FIX: Add or reuse a central test helper, for example `testutils.MakeInitializedDDxRoot(t, dir)`, that creates `.ddx/` and writes a minimal `.ddx/config.yaml`. Update the listed fixtures and callsites to use the helper or explicitly write `.ddx/config.yaml` so they intentionally model initialized DDx projects.

NON-SCOPE: Do not rename `~/.ddx/` to `~/.config/ddx/`. Do not address multi-project federation collisions. Do not change TLS-renew scheduling or rotation logic. Do not change production resolver behavior in this bead beyond what is needed to compile against the helper. Do not add orphan home-state startup warnings in this bead.
bead.acceptance:
1. Add a named helper-level test such as `TestMakeInitializedDDxRoot_WritesConfigYaml` if a new shared helper is introduced.
2. Update `resolver_agent_metrics_test.go` and `resolver_workingdir_ctx_test.go` so named tests including `TestAgentMetrics_*`, `TestNode_ResolvesBeadByID_ScopedToProject`, and `TestNode_ResolvesExecRunByID_ScopedToProject` use initialized `.ddx/config.yaml` fixtures.
3. Update the listed `internal/agent` fixture callsites so named tests in `execution_cleanup_test.go`, `execute_bead_loop_interrupted_attempt_test.go`, `execute_bead_commit_test.go`, `execute_bead_worktree_cleanup_test.go`, `serviceconfig_test.go`, `drain_regression_test.go`, `operator_prompt_backlinks_test.go`, `execute_bead_loop_cleanup_test.go`, `execute_bead_artifacts_test.go`, and `execution_resources_test.go` create initialized `.ddx/config.yaml` fixtures.
4. `cd cli && go test -short ./internal/server/graphql ./internal/agent/...` passes.
5. `cd cli && go test -short ./internal/...` passes after this bead is combined with the resolver change.
6. `lefthook run pre-commit` passes.
